projectDescription: A plain-text document governance system that organises project material into typed rails — current state, decisions, ideas, freeze, surface map, handoff, and archive — so AI-assisted and personal projects stay readable and recoverable through change and interruption.
keyFeatures: Typed document rails that separate current state, decisions, ideas, freeze, and archive
AI lateral kernel (06_ai_to_ai.txt) that governs agent behaviour inside a Signal Rail instance
Guided prompt flows for safe session starts, idea intake, source rebuilds, and re-entry
Append-driven entry zones with strict promotion rules to prevent level and authority blur
Windows bootstrap scripts (BAT + PowerShell) to instantiate a new governed instance in any folder
Offline HTML workstation for reading, staging, and writing back to canonical .txt files
Handoff and re-entry layer (09) for continuity between sessions without overriding canonical truth
Localization kit support for non-English deployments without modifying the baseline
publicApiSurface: 00_runtime_entry.txt — runtime entry gate and system map
03_master_working.txt — current live state, blockers, and next move
06_ai_to_ai.txt — lateral kernel governing AI protocol behaviour
07_guided_prompts_test.txt — guided question flows for safer operating situations
08_surface_map.txt — technical topology, entrypoints, sensitive surfaces, and minimal runbook
09_handoff_reentry.txt — non-canonical continuity and session re-entry layer
97_field_findings.txt — lateral finding capture (BUG / REFINEMENT / SIGNAL / SEED)
